parameters.label: Model
parameters.helpText: Optional provider-defined model identifier that can be referenced from websocket query params and request packets.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid model for custom STT.

parameters.label: Language
parameters.helpText: Optional provider-defined language code that can be referenced from websocket query params and request packets.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid language for custom STT.

parameters.label: Audio Encoding
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "encoding".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid audio encoding for custom STT.

parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.helpText: Available to websocket DSL bindings as "sample_rate".
parameters.errorMessage: Please select a valid sample rate for custom STT.

parameters.label: Query Parameters
parameters.helpText: Optional flat JSON object for dynamic websocket query params. Use {"$var":"..."} and optional {"$cast":"number","value":...} bindings.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide valid query parameters for custom STT.

parameters.label: Audio Request
parameters.helpText: Optional JSON object for websocket audio packets. If omitted, runtime can send raw binary audio frames. Use {"$var":"audio"} and optional {"$cast":...} expressions.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid audio request for custom STT.

parameters.label: Response Parser
parameters.helpText: Required JSON rule list for websocket responses. Each rule defines a text or JSON frame match and emit expressions for script, confidence, language, interim, and error.
parameters.errorMessage: Please provide a valid response parser for custom STT.
